1个30级觉醒【不羁科学】，1个20级【不羁科学】。觉醒是为了加速度。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"体力花费："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"先刷智壳本，智壳升满，再刷源器本。先刷兵祸，C位和缬草满，再刷多琪。疾驰满，再刷智壳。"},{"fontSize":"16px","text":"C位必须刷满暴击爆伤，异常命中核心必须刷2套。缬草无所谓。","bold":true}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"注意事项："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"1 196)","bold":true}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"发现了个机制：","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草在第一回合，释放二技能或者三技能，都无法触发行动后的智壳。","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"三技能释放后的一回合因为自身技能原因，无法行动，也不会触发智壳。","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"结论：缬草只有一技能能触发行动后智壳。自动适合带山海经和千兆字节。手动适合带钻石之心和匠，然后第一回合放二技能。","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"另外，行动指的就是攻击，奶和拉条，只要没造成伤害，都不触发行动后智壳。","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"练度：","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"DvGmt0nnqF2h09Wq","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_451/h_624/50364/253894/2025/8/7/114577.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"247px","height":"342px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"重置了炼，拉了克洛斯。"},{"text":"夜离一定要尽快六星，否则会坐牢","bold":true,"fontSize":"16px","color":"rgb(255, 0)"},{"text":"。缺少材料可以去商店换，我在公会商店换了1个红留影+2个金留影才够。","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""},{"type":"image","key":"ifZc99U6ml74fGWF","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_441/h_637/50364/253894/2025/8/7/864260.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"259px","height":"374px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"dmcDSQ0gKg4Xxfk6","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_442/h_636/50364/253894/2025/8/7/309719.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"257px","height":"370px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"sA5hzhC77OVhbsfs","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_435/h_645/50364/253894/2025/8/7/965465.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"250px","height":"371px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"K7bgHeKIghlgAHDX","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_448/h_638/50364/253894/2025/8/7/680778.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"260px","height":"370px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"2ljUotYCoArw2GQn","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_433/h_637/50364/253894/2025/8/7/852097.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"252px","height":"371px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"主要就是给辅助提速，更新了一波夜离的输出。夜离115，梨梨311。缬草的智壳不该升级的，没什么用。梨梨也不该升级技能的。梨梨的拉条只拉行动力最低的，只要带了缬草，夜离速度就在中间，永远也拉不到，还是升夜离更好。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"失误的点：炼重置早了","bold":true},{"fontSize":"16px","text":"，虽然升完炼的三级3技能就可以重置，但后面还有炼的上阵任务，要打10次兵祸噩梦1及以上，10次虚空的潜能材料本，10次菲比安危机及以上，1次菲比安噩梦。只能等装备碾压再打了，不过那时候肯定是有点亏。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""} 0, 0)"},{"fontSize":"16px","text":"夜离6星后并点满3技能后就能自动过地狱3了。阵容是【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】。"},{"fontSize":"16px","text":"之前过不了的其他系地狱3也可以打一下，可以刷几把风系，点一下克洛斯的潜能。","bold":true}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"抽卡：普池50抽，白嫖券6抽。10连出了多琪（累计61抽）和梨梨（累计2抽）","color":"rgb(29, 9.9","fontSize":"16px"}],"customClass":"custom-block-style__type-7","customStyle":{"--custom-block-style-color":"#00B64F"}},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"玩家等级40级","fontSize":"16px"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"谛听还是吃练度啊，我用【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】【谛听】打兵祸2，成功率50%，用【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】【克洛斯】打，是100%。谛听5星10级，技能455。源器是超凡加卓越。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"认识到一个现实：没有毒队，普通练度是不可能跳过地狱2，直接刷地狱3的。虽然我手动可以过多琪地狱3，但自动就30%成功率，输出还是差一点，导致清第一轮小怪慢了一回合。打兵祸地狱3，用【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】【克洛斯】会差1/4血。用【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】【谛听】会差1/8血。夜离是145，如果夜离455+相同练度的谛听或许能稳定兵祸地狱3。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"体力消耗："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"先刷暗系材料，拉【谛听】。然后发现还是打不过地狱3，就一直刷兵祸地狱2。打了几把奥洛拉的噩梦二，把七日任务做了，领了【绫罗】。没有【蝰蛇】，用【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】【克洛斯】硬打的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"挂了很多把【多琪地狱3】，阵容【夜离】【梨梨】【芙蕾雅】【缬草】【酣梦一宵】，成功率只有50%，但是一个3矩阵的源器都没出，基本是一把一个2矩阵的。地狱2是50%几率出一个4矩阵。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"fontSize":"16px","text":"抽卡：普池40抽，出了荼蘼（累计68抽）和罗睺（累计5抽）","color":"rgb(29,
